recommendations.title: Way Out West
recommendations.overview: Stan and Ollie try to deliver the deed to a valuable gold mine to the daughter of a dead prospector. Unfortunately, the daughter's evil guardian is determined to have the gold mine for himself and his saloon-singer wife.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A bookish college student dismissive of athletics is compelled to try out sports to win the affection of the girl he loves.

recommendations.title: Superstition
recommendations.overview: A witch put to death in 1692 swears vengeance on her persecutors and returns to the present day to punish their descendants.

recommendations.title: A Man Called Otto
recommendations.overview: When a lively young family moves in next door, grumpy widower Otto Anderson meets his match in a quick-witted, pregnant woman named Marisol, leading to an unlikely friendship that turns his world upside down.

recommendations.title: Die Hard: With a Vengeance
recommendations.overview: New York detective John McClane is back and kicking bad-guy butt in the third installment of this action-packed series, which finds him teaming with civilian Zeus Carver to prevent the loss of innocent lives. McClane thought he'd seen it all, until a

recommendations.title: Benji
recommendations.overview: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: American Satan
recommendations.overview: A young rock band, half from England and half from the US, drop out of college and move to the Sunset Strip to chase their dreams.

recommendations.title: Happy Death Day 2U
recommendations.overview: Collegian Tree Gelbman wakes up in horror to learn that she's stuck in a parallel universe. Her boyfriend Carter is now with someone else, and her friends and fellow students seem to be completely different versions of themselves. When Tree discovers
